subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in exploring a collaboration.

We would be happy to arrange an introductory call. The following time windows work on our side:

- 21 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 (UTC)
- 22 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 (UTC)
- 23 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 (UTC)

Please let us know which of these options you prefer, and we will send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for internal contact information: we’re not able to share direct internal contact details, but you can find appropriate public contact channels and information about our leadership team on our public website.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
